mission_title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3C3 — Workshop ComfyUI Manager Helper Dependency Closure

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast, hashlib, json
root = Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
drop = root / "AGENT_FOX_V1A3C3"
installed = root / "System" / "AgentFoxTechnicalCore"
checks = [
    (drop / "workshop_comfyui_manager_dependency_closure_v1.py", installed / "workshop_comfyui_manager_dependency_closure_v1.py", "e47f583a7383e2e7780cac40e6eeabbbc90e3f9139874a82c789bea5e6d08308"),
    (drop / "WORKSHOP_COMFYUI_MANAGER_DEPENDENCY_CONTRACT_V1.json", installed / "WORKSHOP_COMFYUI_MANAGER_DEPENDENCY_CONTRACT_V1.json", "d68b47bdc1765e8315927dbde0fd46233c8160f8e5938d2ea5d5655f84ebc446"),
    (drop / "README_V1A3C3.md", installed / "README_V1A3C3.md", "edc8f7e14ccbc2a781c43639426b78c54dbd41adf3463e576ba43746059e95ad"),
]
for source, target, expected in checks:
    assert source.is_file() and target.is_file(), (source, target)
    assert hashlib.sha256(source.read_bytes()).hexdigest() == expected, source
    assert hashlib.sha256(target.read_bytes()).hexdigest() == expected, target
script_text = (installed / "workshop_comfyui_manager_dependency_closure_v1.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
compile(script_text, str(installed / "workshop_comfyui_manager_dependency_closure_v1.py"), "exec")
tree = ast.parse(script_text)
imports = set()
for node in ast.walk(tree):
    if isinstance(node, ast.Import):
        imports.update(alias.name.split(".")[0] for alias in node.names)
    elif isinstance(node, ast.ImportFrom) and node.module:
        imports.add(node.module.split(".")[0])
forbidden = {"subprocess", "socket", "urllib", "http", "ftplib", "requests", "pip", "ensurepip", "psutil", "winreg", "ctypes", "webbrowser", "importlib"}
assert not (imports & forbidden), sorted(imports & forbidden)
contract = json.loads((installed / "WORKSHOP_COMFYUI_MANAGER_DEPENDENCY_CONTRACT_V1.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert contract["mission_id"] == "ENG-20260721-224437-0FDDE1"
assert contract["target"]["context_id"] == "CTX-EEC78B5B382B239D"
assert contract["target"]["path_group_id"] == "PATHGROUP-25300F3FBF74CEEB"
assert contract["target"]["launcher_line"] == 12
assert contract["expected_preliminary_topology"] == {
    "reached_source_count": 1,
    "dependency_edge_count": 0,
    "unresolved_branch_count": 1,
    "unresolved_module": "psutil",
    "unresolved_line": 190,
}
assert contract["related_pending_context"]["context_id"] == "CTX-68030A15EE97A526"
assert contract["related_pending_context"]["context_built"] is False
assert contract["scope"]["rollback_drive_k_accessed"] is False
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3C3_INSTALL_PREFLIGHT_OK")

validations.name: Verify preliminary one-node topology and psutil unresolved branch before source reads
Build one bounded Workshop ComfyUI manager dependency closure
Run built-in V1A-3C3 output, hash, safety, single-read, separation, and 8-MiB validators

argv:
from pathlib import Path, PureWindowsPath
import json
out = Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-224437-0FDDE1_V1A3C3_WORKSHOP_COMFYUI_MANAGER_CLOSURE")
context_output = json.loads((out / "WORKSHOP_COMFYUI_MANAGER_CONTEXT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
coverage = json.loads((out / "WORKSHOP_COMFYUI_MANAGER_COVERAGE.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
closure = json.loads((out / "WORKSHOP_COMFYUI_MANAGER_FIRST_PARTY_CLOSURE.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
unresolved = json.loads((out / "WORKSHOP_COMFYUI_MANAGER_UNRESOLVED_BRANCHES.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
receipt = json.loads((out / "WORKSHOP_COMFYUI_MANAGER_CLOSURE_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
def norm(value):
    return str(PureWindowsPath(str(value or ""))).casefold()
context = context_output["context"]
related = context_output["related_pending_direct_context"]
assert context["context_id"] == "CTX-EEC78B5B382B239D"
assert context["path_group_id"] == "PATHGROUP-25300F3FBF74CEEB"
assert context["line"] == 12
assert norm(context["launcher_path"]) == norm("Z:/FOXAI/Launch FOXAI Workshop.bat")
assert norm(context["script_path"]) == norm("Z:/FOXAI/System/PortableRuntime/manage_comfyui_normal.py")
assert norm(context["resolved_interpreter_path"]) == norm("Z:/FOXAI/Runtime/Desktop/python/python.exe")
assert context["flags"] == ["-I", "-B", "-S"]
arguments = context["arguments"]
assert len(arguments) == 5
assert arguments[0] == "--root" and norm(arguments[1]) == norm("Z:/FOXAI")
assert arguments[2:] == ["spawn", "--source", "workshop"]
assert related["context_id"] == "CTX-68030A15EE97A526"
assert related["path_group_id"] == "PATHGROUP-266CA7411F12A68D"
assert related["launcher_line"] == 24
assert norm(related["script_path"]) == norm("Z:/FOXAI/foxai.py")
assert related["context_built_by_this_mission"] is False
assert related["nodes_or_edges_included"] is False
assert closure["node_count"] == 1 and closure["edge_count"] == 0
assert closure["related_context_nodes_or_edges_included"] is False
assert coverage["preliminary_reached_source_count"] == 1
assert coverage["preliminary_dependency_edge_count"] == 0
assert coverage["preliminary_unresolved_branch_count"] == 1
assert coverage["related_context_built"] is False
assert coverage["related_context_nodes_or_edges_included"] is False
records = unresolved.get("records", [])
assert any(str(row.get("module")) == "psutil" and int(row.get("line") or 0) == 190 for row in records)
assert receipt["internal_deterministic_rebuild_match"] is True
assert receipt["related_context_built"] is False
assert receipt["interpreter_child_processes"] == 0 and receipt["shell_child_processes"] == 0
assert receipt["network_used"] is False and receipt["packages_installed"] is False and receipt["models_loaded"] is False
assert receipt["existing_foxai_source_modified"] is False
print(json.dumps({
    "status": "AGENT_FOX_V1A3C3_EXACT_CONTEXT_AND_SEPARATION_VERIFIED",
    "context_id": context["context_id"],
    "path_group_id": context["path_group_id"],
    "launcher_line": context["line"],
    "node_count": closure["node_count"],
    "edge_count": closure["edge_count"],
    "preliminary_unresolved_branch_count": coverage["preliminary_unresolved_branch_count"],
    "unresolved_module": "psutil",
    "unresolved_line": 190,
    "related_pending_context_id": related["context_id"],
    "related_context_built": False,
}, sort_keys=True))
